title: ClientRedirectionPolicyEnum
description: Controls whether Auth0 redirects users to the application's callback URL on authentication errors or in email verification flows. `open_redirect_protection` shows an error page instead of redirecting, and hides the callback domain from email templates. `allow_always` enables standard redirect behavior. Defaults to `open_redirect_protection` for third-party clients. Only applies when `is_first_party` is `false` and `third_party_security_mode` is `strict`. To learn more, read Redirect protection.
